title: YST-226 My colleague's wife will be my exclusive meat urinal for the next 3 days Tsukasa Nagano
description: A man who suddenly appeared while his husband was on a business trip. It was my husband's colleague and the man I worked with at work before getting married. There was a lot of talk, but it seems that he will get married soon. However, the colleague's man was not confident in his night life and said with a straight face that he wanted to practice using Tsukasa's body. Of course, Tsukasa refused with all his might, but when he was feather-touched and kissed, he gradually became a female expression.
